headline: Applied Materials Inc (NASDAQ:AMAT): A Disciplined Dividend Growth Play Beyond the High Yield
summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) earns a strong dividend rating not from high yield, but from 14.79% annual growth, a low 18% payout ratio, and excellent profitability and financial health, making it a reliable long-term income stock.
